title: Complicated Bundles
description: This Mod Adds Custom Bundle To Minecraft
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/febe2126b31706b49720836a8aa75d733cb25127.png) # This Mod Adds **Custom Bundles** To Minecraft This Mod Adds Custom Bundles To **Minecraft** There is 5 types of Bundles - Iron Bundle - Gold Bundle - Emerald Bundle - Diamond Bundle - Netherite Bundle Every Bundle has Different Recipe Every Bundle is Better Than Other ## **Support Me!** https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw
